name: Chocolate Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt; make a well in the center.
3. In a small bowl, mix milk, pumpkin, butter, and egg. Add this mixture to the well in the flour mixture.
4. Stir until the dry ingredients are moistened. Fold in chocolate chips.
5. Spoon the batter into greased muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
6. Sprinkle chopped nuts over each muffin.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 18-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
This recipe makes 12 muffins.
